subject: feat(theme): add user-controllable theme toggle with dark/light/auto modes
body:
Theme was locked to system preference with no user override, causing white
pages when system has no explicit scheme. Now defaults to dark and persists
the user's choice via AsyncStorage. Toggle lives in the burger menu as three
chips (Light / Dark / Auto). Web HTML body always starts dark to prevent
white flash.

Tags: theme, ux, dark-mode, burger-menu
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theming
Semver: minor
